text: ECO-178 drafted: change chassis bracket material from AL-6063-T5 to AL-7075-T6 in two specific high-flux regions. Net mass delta -3g per assembly. Sending to David for fast-track review.
Fast-track review opened. Need Raj sign-off (EMC not affected), Mei sign-off (sourcing), Lin sign-off (testing plan). Target close by Thursday EOD.
Firmware retest after PR #214: motor driver retries to spec (5 attempts), thermal load tracks 7°C lower under sustained slew. Cleared. Closing the firmware lane.
Testing plan for ECO-178: re-run thermal cycling on units 3, 7, 9 with revised brackets. Drop test on units 1, 4. Re-baseline if peak temp drops under 78°C with 12% margin to spec.
AL-7075-T6 supplier engaged. Lead 4 weeks for first lot. Cost +24% per kg vs AL-6063-T5 but volume is small in these regions. ECO-178 sourcing path approved from my side.
New observation worth flagging: BMS over-temp deassert hysteresis seems wider than expected during chamber tests. Not a fail, but worth a firmware look before PVT.
On it. Pulling the BMS firmware deassert constants now. Was set for the older cell chemistry — likely needs a tighter hysteresis for BC-18650 v2.
AlumWest trial lot arriving Friday. Will route to incoming inspection same day so Lin can start bracket re-fab Monday if QA passes.
